summary: Iteration 8 - Comprehensive Content Review Fixes Testing Complete. All 12 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend/UI tests passed. Verified 16+ content accuracy fixes: progress bar behavior, token counts, transformer layers, AutoGen status, Tools & Resources category, MongoDB mermaid diagram, UI Guide Rollback location, and more. Database verified with 46 categories and 37 documents after re-seed.
critical_code_review_comments: ReadingProgress component correctly renders only when activeDoc exists (line 1644 in App.js)
Progress bar only shows when scroll progress >= 2% (line 1494 in App.js)
Tools & Resources category (CAT_TOOLS) has Essential Tools & Resources document (seed_data.py line 1753)
Debug Panel correctly shows ~15,000 tokens (seed_data.py line 1449)
How Transformers Work correctly shows 32-128 layers (seed_data.py lines 604, 617)
UI Guide correctly shows Rollback in message panel/chat area (seed_data.py line 2746)
MongoDB Document Model has mermaid diagram (seed_data.py lines 1074-1081)

test_credentials.no_auth: No authentication required. All users are default admin.

seed_data_creation: None - verified existing re-seeded data (46 categories, 37 documents)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Content accuracy fixes verified. All 16+ content changes from user review applied successfully. Progress bar behavior: appears only on document pages (not home page), only visible after scrolling (progress >= 2%). Tools & Resources now shows 1 document. Token count is ~15,000. Transformer layers are 32-128. AutoGen is Production-ready. Rollback described in message panel/chat area. MongoDB has mermaid diagram. Analytics dashboard working at /analytics.

progress_bar_home_page.details: Progress bar NOT visible on home page (correct - only on document pages)

progress_bar_document_page.details: Progress bar appears on document page after scrolling (shows 57% when scrolled)

tools_resources_category.details: Tools & Resources category shows 1 document on home page (Essential Tools & Resources)

debug_panel_token_count.details: Debug Panel page correctly says ~15,000 tokens (not ~10,000)

transformers_layer_count.details: How Transformers Work says 32-128 layers (not x96)

autogen_status.details: Agent Framework Landscape says AutoGen is Production-ready (not research-oriented)

ui_guide_rollback.details: UI Guide describes Rollback as being in message panel/chat area

mongodb_mermaid_diagram.details: MongoDB Document Model page has a mermaid diagram

analytics_dashboard.details: Analytics dashboard works at /analytics with all components

home_page_loading.details: Home page loads correctly with all categories displayed

regression_tests.search_functionality: PASS - Top Search Queries visible in analytics
